Artist: ACOR
Title: Welcome To London Yo EP
Label: M O R C [Ministry Of Rave Culture]
Catalogue: MORC014
Format: Digital

Style: #Techno
Release date: February 22, 2022

1. ACOR - Welcome To London Yo (Original Mix)

M O R C [Ministry Of Rave Culture] is a label and project for the promotion of underground music and culture, based in Serbia.   

ACOR is an upcoming producer and DJ from Serbia. His mix of industrial elements with other influences from different genres of electronic music, creates unique techno pieces. He combines hard techno with Acid and schranz techno in his unique touch. Supported by 999999999, Cassie Raptor, Nico Moreno, OBI, CARAVEL, DYEN, etc...

track.title: SINDEX PREMIERE: Jay High - On The Floor
track.description:
"Do you recall how the cool kids would always arrive to class the latest possible? 
Well, guess what? With Sonntagsinstitut Records 002, it's the same! We're delighted to present our very own little EP of trance edits, which we know is a little late for the buzz but nonetheless firing out of all holes.

This Various Artist EP, which includes tracks from every producer in the collective, displays a glittering, unashamed, all-pleasure-no-guilt palette of modern techno and trance interpretations of present- and past-day pop music.

Sonntagsinstitut 002 would undoubtedly board the bus in the last row, chewing gum, looking as cool as a Capri Ice on a hot summers day.

If you want to join the ride, just head over to our Bandcamp and grab the EP for free!"

Release Date: 09.06.2023
Format: digital only
Mastering by tymotica

Instagram: www.instagram.com/sonntagsinstitut Soundcloud: @sonntagsinstitut

track.title: そんなゆめをみたの-lonely dreaming girl
LeonAEIOU - I JUST CANT GET ENOUGH (FERGIE DUB)
Marea (we’ve lost dancing)
track.description:
Alright so this could nottttttt have been timed better! ❤️🥳🕺💃🥳❤️

Literally an hour after Boris announces that we can see the horizon of beautiful messy sticky dark noisy ravesssss, we are putting out our song about longing for the return of that culture! And I swear down this is just a truly wonderful coincidence! But it makes me feel really verrrrry happy. 🤗🤗🤗

The Blessed Madonna and I had a chat on zoom a few months back now and she was talking in the infinite and naturally poetic way that she does about, well really how everrrrrryone is feeling! And because we were writing it was being recorded! So I sampled it! And tuned her to be singing at times and I just reeallllyyy love it. And also an enormous big ups to the great Boston Bun who we produced it with. 
🤩 🥯 🍞 📠

It was jus Annie’s hottest record in the world on BBC R1 and is now out everywhere!!!
I feel excited. Is how I feel. Foreal.

track.title: [PLÖVA001] HiTMiLØW  - Come Take My Hand (Hard Sport EDIT)
track.description:
We are more than happy to present you our first various artist EP featuring a spectrum of different sounds contributed   by 12 talented artist. We decided to turn the sale of these tracks into a fundraising  campaign in order to help  the hardworking hands of SEA-WATCH. However, it is as crucial to spread awareness about the work they are doing. 

WHAT IS SEA-WATCH e.V. DOING? 
“Sea-Watch e.V. is a non-profit initiative dedicated to civil sea rescue in the central Mediterranean Sea. In spite of an ongoing and state-initiated humanitarian catastrophe, we are providing urgent emergency aid. We demand and force rescue operations through the responsible European institutions and publicly stand up for legal escape routes as well as for freedom of movement and a Europe of solidarity.“

‘indirektes Zitat’ benutzt (vgl. https://sea-watch.org/, 14.06.23)

All the collected proceeds will go directly to Sea-Watch e.V.

We will be selling theses tracks on our Bandcamp account until the 22.12.2023. However if you cannot contribute anything in terms of money there will be an option to download the tracks (MP3 version) for free. This is only possible until the 22.09.2023.

track.title: SINDEX PREMIERE: Herr Spinnler - Mi Fugue Mi Raison
track.description:
Instagram: www.instagram.com/dalfrecords/?utm…OGQ5ZDc2ODk2ZA==
Artist: on.soundcloud.com/yRekH

DALF vol.1

This first opus is a cocktail of sounds that meet, mix and melt:
French Touch, Deep House, Micro House, Ambient, Progressive, Reggaeton, Breakbeat, Jungle, Drum & Bass, Dubstep, Hard House, Groove Techno, Trance…
DALF vol.1 takes you on an epic journey that progresses throughout the night.

The journey begins gently, with warm, organic house music that evokes the early evening as the sun sets.
As the night progresses, the compilation increases in intensity. More progressive rhythms and bewitching melodies take you to the dancefloor. The heart of the night beats to the rhythm of powerful music, hypnotic bass and high BPMs. This is part 3, where the most assiduous dancers will find what they're looking for, stimulated by the sounds of break & bass music.
The compilation reaches its climax in part 4 with hard house, groove techno and trance tracks that will keep you moving until the sun comes up.

This compilation is an invitation to dance,
from living room dancers to tireless night owls in search of unforgettable after-parties. Here, madness is our favorite dance.
So let's dance. Let's dance with passion, with fervor, whether in the light or the shadows.

track.title: [PREMIERE] DJ HÖRDE - EPIC AMBIENT INTRO [TAUBEXOXO2]
track.description:
Taube Records, the fresh face on the block, rips up the rulebook with DJ HÖRDE's 'Unreleased Forever EP'. DJ HÖRDE skyrocketed last year with his banger tracks and continues to redefine high-energy trance, donk, and ravy electro, blending uplifting and emotionally charged electronic music. The EP features a collaboration track with label founder Taube, infusing it with a fast-paced donk bass rhythm and distinctive 'energy-fantasy' vocals, setting an unparalleled vibe. Another highlight is the monumental collaboration with Turbosh – the duo behind Taube Records' inaugural release – providing an epic closing to this remarkable collection. DJ HÖRDE presents a raw, unapologetic sound, embodying the new energy of high BPMs and a no-rules approach that breaks from entrenched formalism.

track.title: DJBOUNTY3000 - Hot Cold  (Bounty edit)
track.description:
Liebe Nonchalance-Community,

wir möchten euch auch in diesem Jahr wieder etwas ganz Besonderes zur Vorweihnachtszeit schenken. Inspiriert von unserer erfolgreichen Soliaktion vor 3 Jahren mit den Nonchalance Shirts, haben wir uns für dieses Jahr einen Adventskalender ausgedacht, der jeden Tag ein neues "Törchen" öffnet und euch mit verschiedenen Überraschungen beschenkt.

Der Hauptbestandteil unseres Non-Adventskalenders ist eine Solicompilation mit Tracks von namenhaften Künstler:innen. Mit dieser Aktion möchten wir nicht nur euch eine Freude machen, sondern auch etwas Gutes tun. Deshalb haben wir gemeinsam mit Seawatch einen Spendenlink eingerichtet, über den ihr einen Beitrag leisten könnt, der eure finanziellen Möglichkeiten berücksichtigt. Unser Spendenziel bis zum 24.12. beträgt 2.600€, was etwa 1€ pro Follower entspricht.

Mit dieser Soliaktion möchten wir Musik als Ventil nutzen, um denen, die weniger haben, etwas zurückzugeben und Helfenden in Not zu helfen. Wir hoffen, dass wir gemeinsam mit euch dieses Ziel erreichen können und freuen uns über jede Unterstützung. 

Vielen Dank und bleibt gespannt!
Eure Nonchalance Crew

track.title: 📺 PREMIERE - Cleopard2000 - Blue [PULZARVA002.2]
track.description:
For their new release PULZARVA002 the Berlin record label PULZAR Recordings (@p-u-l-z-a-r) is cooking up a various artists fundraiser double compilation. Curated nicely with international artists the first part of the release (002.1) features Techno music while the second part of the compilation (002.2) contains Trance music. 

The money will be donated to the K41 Community Fund (https://k41community.fund). K41 is a prominent Techno club in Kyiv that offers shelter and support for Ukrainians in general and creatives in particular. 

A record release party will take place at the Berlin club “Zur Klappe” on July 22nd (https://ra.co/events/1730014). 

Artist: Cleopard2000
Track: Blue
Label: PULZAR Recordings

track.title: DJ Gigola - La Batteria (Extended Version)
track.description:
PRODUCER: DJ Gigola
LABEL: Live From Earth, Method808
MIXING: Rifts, Simon Hoffmann (Hoffmann Mastering)
MASTER: Conor Dalton (Glowcast Audio Mastering)
ARTWORK:Tim Lindacher, Annika Bohn, Johannes Schreiner
RELEASE DATE: 24/05/24

Fanlink: https://djgigola.lnk.to/labatteria

In a world where social batteries are constantly drained, and spa weekends seem out of reach, DJ Gigola's latest single, "La Batteria," emerges as the perfect antidote to recharge and rejuvenate. Following a prolific 2023 that witnessed the release of her
debut album, "Fluid Meditations," alongside multiple singles and a notable collaboration with X-Coast, DJ Gigola returns with an electrifying force.
"La Batteria" by DJ Gigola stands as a personal interpretation and homage to the original masterpiece, "La Batteria della Mente," crafted by Dottor Dag nearly two decades ago in 2005. Drawing inspiration from her profound affinity for lento violento
and the early works of Dottor Dag, the original track swiftly became a cherished favorite in DJ Gigola's debut Boiler Room in 2022.
Fuelled by her passion for high-energy DJ sets and a distinctive soundscape, DJ Gigola embarked on a journey to breathe new life into the timeless composition. With her unique touch, including the infusion of her signature vocals, she reimagined and
revitalized "La Batteria," delivering a version that resonates with her dynamic style.
This rendition serves as a testament to DJ Gigola's signature club sound. The track features a distinctive vocal sample echoing the proclamation, "la batteria è completamente ricaricata" – “the battery is fully recharged.” This declaration sets the tone for the infectious energy that permeates the composition. Anchored by a robust
four-to-the-floor drum pattern and adorned with nods to eurodance through captivating synths, "La Batteria" is poised to become a dance floor anthem, pulsating with vitality throughout the year. DJ Gigola, with her unparalleled creativity, invites
listeners to tap into the reinvigorating energy of "La Batteria" and experience the sonic journey she meticulously crafted.

DJ JAYS, an up-and-coming talent from Cologne, has already made a name for himself with a series of edits and self-releases. His unique style is characterized by fast, catchy beats and infectious melodies that inevitably get the audience dancing.

Our next event: ra.co/promoters/125255

FREE DL: https://hypeddit.com/gasoiidtechnomisery
Support us: www.onlytr4nce.bandcamp.com/

𝑺𝑶𝑼𝑹𝑪𝑬: 𝑺𝑬𝑳𝑲𝑬𝑹 - 𝑻𝑶𝑶 𝑴𝑼𝑪𝑯 𝑭𝑶𝑹 𝑴𝑬 (𝑨𝑫𝑨𝑴 𝑪𝑼𝑻𝑻𝑰𝑵𝑮 𝑹𝑬𝑴𝑰𝑿)
https://tinyurl.com/ONLYNXC-REPENTANCE

For ONLYTRANCE's EP III we welcome NXC & art nightcore artists @gasoiid and @fallenshrine. 'INRI' is an audiovisual triptych that takes you on a modern retelling of the biblical journey of Repentance, Rebirth, and Renewal. Listening instructions: As you hit play, close your eyes and let the music wash over you— you'll begin to sense the undercurrent of Gaia coursing softly through your veins. Posture your wounded heart to the bass drum and watch as you unlock the healing from the higher consciousness within. Didn’t you know that 𝒕𝒓𝒂𝒏𝒄𝒆 was God's music? They really are found in the details.

ONLYTRANCE
@onlytr4nce
instagram.com/onlytr4nce

gasoiid
@gasoiid
https://www.instagram.com/gasoiid/

Artwork instagram.com/rokobelavie

Mastering @belavie

track.title: ✮  a world away.. ✮
track.description:
DANCING IN AN ENDING WORLD VOLUME 2

Super happy with this incredible project, full of crazy tracks to dance and let go. Shoutout to the undernet family, my solid keef family, zuzu family, MidiBoyz, Yung Boom, Felisiano and White Widow, always remembered.

Fav track: te tenia (BY FAR)

THANKS TO ALL THE PEOPLE THAT HELPED ME MAKE THIS PROJECT:

Beansclub: everyone knows the goat, crazy energy, always with some fire wips prepared https://soundcloud.com/beansclub

Stillscapes: the 2k25 hero, gonna crush it with that heavy style u got, absolutely carried the trackhttps://soundcloud.com/scaapes

Aero-JI: Been wanting to work with this guy for AGES and he completely crushed it with the craziest leads and melodies ive ever heard https://soundcloud.com/aero_ji

Ghost in the System: LONG AWAITED COLLAB what a goat, she flipped the track in a way i'd have never expected, so happy to finally work with u <3 https://soundcloud.com/ghostinthesystem

Moa♻️: Ay what can i say bout my homeboy, u know its always a pleasure to work with u, carried the whole thing... ay who wouldve thought wetor vega would make it this far https://soundcloud.com/moa999

trejnts: Xulakooo always a pleasure, crazy to work with this legend, vaya temasos nos sakamos pa moverlo to ajajja tupoya https://soundcloud.com/juanista

ilytoo: What an incredibly talented artist, dropped the hottest melodies of the game, we managed to cook a super fire track homie <3 also 2k25 goat aswell listen to em https://soundcloud.com/ily-also

dreamloader: ASWELL LONG AWAITED COLLAB finally so happy to work with u always enjoying ur quality and simple but PRO melodies and arrangements, been a pleasure since u first discovered me long ago <3 https://soundcloud.com/dreamloader

VISUAL TEAM:
cyberxoxo: gracias por todo no hace falta ke te repita ke literalmente carreas toda esta vaina, crazy visuals from the 3d goat, cooking up that hype https://www.instagram.com/cyberxoxo/

COVER:
rata333splinter aka Bosko laLune: tusabe miloko i love u with the deep heart u feel me fire lettering ON THE SPOT ON GANG fire cover pillando el point pa kearse empiketaos https://www.instagram.com/rata333splinter/

ALSO ON YOUTUBE 
SPOTIFY VERY SOON

track.title: LAMMER - Out Of Space (Like its 1992 Mix)
track.description:
Been a massive fan of The Prodigy for as long as I can remember, discovered them back in the early YouTube days, and they’ve been shaping my sound ever since. The ravey vibes, the raw breakbeats... it’s all in there.

For the last two years, Out of Space has been stuck in my head, just begging for a 4 to the floor flip so I could bring that Prodigy energy into my sets. So I gave it a go :)

Hope I did this classic justice! Grab the free download on my Hypeddit or Bandcamp!

Hypeddit: https://hypeddit.com/lammer/space

In an effort to give back to our community, which has been hit hard during Covid-19, over the past month, we’ve been collecting unreleased tracks from some of our favorite musical artists. ALL of the money raised through this purchase will go to the Artist Relief Project, which was created to help artists in need during Covid-19.

Sirens Scrapyard takes form as a digital album with an A and B side. Side A takes listeners on an emotionally ambient ride and Side B celebrates high energy rave hymns.

If you are in need of support yourself you can request funding here:
artistreliefproject.org/request_funding/

track.description:
rise up! o mother of all pains

lyrics:

~ verse 1 ~
pressure building spitting steam from the vents
you caught me in the middle of a fix of the lens
the portrait on the wall will show you what you protect
ironically you are the very lord you resent
tell me again about your mountain of men
i heard a little rumor you belittle your friends
i heard that every soul can lose a chance to repent
admonish me again and ill make war for the spent

~ chorus ~
my head is spinning
im moving sideways 
no chance of winning
its just like always 
the sky is all grey 
torment of all days
cant eat cant sleep cant just stop thinking bout it

my heart is lost now
so much for trying
given up hope now
reign on you tyrant
rusted my lifeline
no use in crying 
cant bleed cant sleep cant just stop thinking bout it

~ verse 2 ~
Rise up! 
O mother of all pains 
to the altar of my verses!
no god 
or hell can make up 
the pitiful misery you wrought thee 

[chorus]

~ verse 3 ~

pressure spent look at the mess you created
when all is said and done theyll only groan at your name 
no pride behind a legend full of nothing but shame
100 years of silence broken only in vain 

[chorus x2]

track.title: hulaHOOP.fm: D V D megamix
track.description:
Welcome back to hulaHOOP dot fm where our latest mix is brought to you by D V D, the Soundcloud legend who is the embodiment of No Fucks Given, All Fun Had. His unique hard dance style fuses nightcore, classic trance, and all the hottest hits and his edits and originals can be heard at raves all around the world, including at hulaHOOP. This jam packed megamix whips through a mix of genres and styles for some heart-pumping, nonstop fun. New single "Don't Wait" with Donatachi is out now.

​​“When performing, It’s my goal to curate a genre spanning journey of my favourite new & unreleased high energy dance music. I want to give the audience the opportunity for a sing along, a cry, and a hakk no matter how short or long I'm playing.”

track.title: ⁺｡✽°⋆ α j𖦹ยгℵєץ h𝓞Պє ⋆˚☽₊‧⁺
track.description:
😇

@ruddaz ⠀ + ⠀@gasoiid ⠀ + ⠀@coast2coast
⠀
☆.。.:・°☆.。.:・°☆.。.:・°☆.。.:・°☆

for those without unicode support:          

gasoiid - a journey home ミ★

☆.。.:・°☆.。.:・°☆.。.:・°☆.。.:・°☆
⠀
hi. its been so long that idk what to really say here.  

this song means a lot to me because ive been on a journey myself of trying to find my way back home. my way back to myself. finding myself. or rather, returning to myself. 

this account has been with me through so much, and it’s really incredible to see just how far these silly edits have taken me over the course of these years. i realize now that even when i felt completely and utterly lost and alone, god was aligning my steps and cleaning up the road ahead of me. 

its felt really good to dive into the idea of god, and who he is to me. after having been a vehement atheist my whole life, to really have my entire worldview, mind, and perception be changed so much in such a short amount of time has been a mind boggling change for me to experience. 

a journey of truth is never an easy one, but i’ve really felt like ive found the missing piece to my life in him. 

and im happy :)

im happy because i no longer feel defeated everytime I open my eyes, i no longer feel the weight of comparison crushing my spirit whenever i look at my friends and my peers living their truths and making their dreams come true. 

i may not be the best, but thats okay for me, because i’m no longer ashamed to be me. and im returning to who that “me” really is, and it feels good. 

of course there are a lot of growing pains, but ive done so many things in this past year that i never would have ever thought possible for me just 2-4 years ago. 

i played my first international show in berlin (big ty to @candyflip030!) and rn as of writing this im slated to go to las vegas to perform my first domestic show with @purityleech and the roflcopter crew [6.28.2025!!!! so end of this month]

that inner critic inside of me still talks but im learning how to no longer listen to him. im learning what it means to believe in a vision and truly have faith. im learning what it means to surrender. im learning how to take the good with the bad, and find the good IN the bad. 

at the beginning of this year my entire life was turned upside down, i lost my friends, my bf, and pretty much my entire life. and i spent the end of last year living in fear and trying to claw on a door that god had closed for me. but now 6 months into 2025 im actually happier than ive been in a long time. and yes my new life is not easy, god is instilling in me the virtue of responsibility, but it is good. 

and i want to continue growing. I still battle with fear on a daily basis. I still have major anxieties and insecurities. and I still feel so unworthy of any kind of success that whenever I get any sliver of it I have the urge to self sabotage.... but im learning how to OVERCOME. 

i want to continue becoming the true version of me, the me that i never knew i could be. i know it’s in there, and i know i will find him, i just have to keep going, and i need to have faith. and i know that there are things that i want that i may not ever get, but im learning how to become okay with that. 

im finally thankful for this life of mine. and i can’t believe that it’s taken me this long to start living. yes i may be a late bloomer, but im glad to be blooming now nonetheless. this is just the beginning…. this is just the beginning  ⠀ ⠀ ˚₊‧꒰ა 𓂋 ໒꒱ ‧₊˚


- g.   =)   <3

track.title: hulaHOOP.fm: ANOP megamix
track.description:
We’re back again at hulaHOOP.fm The latest megamix from Manchester and Leeds based producer ANOP is twinkly, sparkly, and glitters from another dimension. It’s the perfect mix for closed eyes swaying and to keep you comforted during the cold months of the winter. ANOP is a resident at Dreamland, which throws hyperpop, hard dance, and trance parties in Manchester and Leeds, creating a space for twinkly producers. Dreamland is set to release a compilation later later this year in the spring.

@an0p

“To embody the spirit of the megamix, this mix is a rapid exploration of sounds across the euphoric hard dance spectrum, made with love!! From nightcore, makina, trance, hyperpop and more, it's sounds that have influenced me and Dreamland, from the talented Leeds and Manchester producers and selectors around me, to the SoundCloud cyberspace from HulaHOOP, to the vast amount of incredible people who've been pushing twinkly magic that brings people together!! <33”

track.description:
(Let's go!)

I couldn’t name the place I’m going
Even though I’ve been there six or seven different times
I can tell the sky is getting darker
I might fuck around and walk back home alone tonight
And even though I came here just to nurse a bottle, to the mouth or to the face, my mom says not to talk to guys
But if a stranger looks me in the eyes and orders me into the restroom, I’m just not the type to put up too much of a fight

You know I’m not like all the othеr girls around the function
He could have gonе and chosen any single one of them
I know it’s not my voice, it’s not my looks, he wants to rush in
When you’re a rarity, you end up shackled to a bed
The music’s way too loud and I don’t care if he don’t love me
It’s just a number, what’s a couple drinks around some friends?
And for some reason I don’t mind it when he interrupts me
He looks me in the eyes and I can tell i might be dead

Put me in your pocket, baby, let’s go for a drive
Let me tell a little secret, I’ve lived way too many lives
I know that you want it, baby, let me be your little crime
I don’t know where i would end up if i make it past tonight
Put me in your pocket, baby, let’s go for a drive
Let me tell a little secret, I’ve lived way too many lives
I know that you want it, baby, let me be your little crime
I don’t know where i would end up if i make it past tonight

(The devil inside of you says to listen to secret girlfriend)
(Secret girlfriend 2036 world domination)
(My lifelong dream has finally come true)
(Of course i’m not in love with him, It’s just a convenience)

I see it coming for me six or seven miles away
I greet it standing in the road, a smile on my face
He treats me like a million bucks when he wants something i can give, i wake up in the hospital along with bruises on my face

I see it coming for me, I’m convinced i love the pain
I greet it standing in the road, a smile on my face
He treats me like a million dollars, give him everything
I wake up in the hospital alone with the new-

Never thought I’d make it this far off the path
Got a smoke in hand like I’m a man
Then he gives a smile, spits a laugh
“You know pretty things like you aren’t meant to throw-“ (ugh)
Got a funny feeling in my chest
Got a smoke in hand like I’m a man
Then he flicks the lighter, takes a drag
“You know pretty things like you aren’t meant to throw tantrums”

track.title: Stainless Sounds 02 - C3NTELL4
track.description:
ESP: C3NTELL4 es un artista de Chile, toca géneros como el breakcore, sextrance y hexd. Comenzó a producir música en el año 2020 por aburrimiento debido a la cuarentena, se instaló FL Studio y un amigo le dio clases de lo básico, después de eso empezó a indagar en los subgéneros de la electronica mas under, llegando al Hexd conociendo artistas como Anthony1, sienna sleep, limp pumpo, etc... haciéndose fan instantáneo de toda la escena e inspirándose en ellxs para seguir haciendo música. Posteriormente empezó a interactuar más con la comunidad gracias a internet, llegando a generar amistades dentro de la escena y pudiendo formar lo que es su proyecto actualmente.
Pronombres: Él/Ella

ENG: C3NTELL4 is an artist from Chile who plays genres such as breakcore, sextrance, and hexd. He started producing music in 2020 out of boredom due to quarantine, installed FL Studio, and a friend taught him basic notions. After that, he delved into the under electronic sub-genres, discovering hexd and artists like Anthony1, Sienna Sleep, Limp Pumpo, etc. He instantly became a fan of the entire scene and was inspired by them to continue making music. Later, he started to interact more with the community thanks to the internet, forming friendships within the scene and ultimately leading to his current project.
Pronouns: He/ She

https://soundcloud.com/centellaculiao?utm_source=clipboard&utm_medium=text&utm_campaign=social_sharing

track.title: 3DMA - Alien Invasion
track.description:
@333dma

BODYLEPSIS is a compilation album in response to austerity, tories and anti-rave bills. It is Rave as-Protest, a visceral expression of disdain for the current political climate, outrage through noise, a poetic communal uproar; a strong artistic recording of our current cultural landscape. It demands a hijack of spaces and ourselves to recentre the people at the heart of hardcore. It's an outline of our ethos: anti-corporation and anti-copshavinglimbs.

This release figures rave as ritual, as a form of protest; losing yourself in the rave is the dissolution of the body as encumbrance, world, and prison that protest aims to produce, a rave is a riot. The rave is inexorably a reaction to material conditions, contemporary politics of space, expression, atomic collision of subversive noise pollution and the sanitised, enforced sonic landscape of the capitalist metropolis, a space figuring the dancefloor as a space, of not an escape from; but confrontation with, suffering, in pursuit of not some abstract catharsis but material change, a soundclash against suffering.

All profits go to The Outside Project charity.

track.description:
THIS IS NIGHTCORE. I DID NOT PRODUCE THIS. THE OG IS BY @ODDMOB


CHECK OUT THIS video visualizer made by @yxzus <3
www.youtube.com/watch?v=pVG_6UYWhVE

ι cαη'т rℓℓу єχρℓαιη ιт . . . i'm ѕσ—η2υ <3 
⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀
lettering: @djhimera ⠀⠀⠀｡･:*･:*:･｡
@jasmine-jasmine-jasmine's: https://bit.ly/2ScVFgh
OG: https://soundcloud.com/oddmob/odd-mob-into-you-feat-starley-radio-edit-1 ⠀⠀(@oddmob)

💙 💠 ☄️ 🔷 💙⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ 
🔹 💎 🆒  💎 🔹
💙 🔷 ☄️ 💠 💙

(oh look, another odd mob and starley nxc from gasoiid... what's new 🙄)

whewwww!!! this is my first track of 2019, and so much has changed from when i posted "g0tta hav3" a full year ago from today. i think my audience per se has grown a lot since that release, and also i've grown a lot as an artist/person as well. 

..... i have so many thoughts swirling around in my head right now and i really don't know how to articulate them all..... 

OK so firstly...let me talk abt the song a bit:
i rlly love this song a lot bc it is a blend of three of my favorite things ever; 90's r&b, house music, and nightcore :)
so this song in particular, is a gasoiid™ approved nxc edit of one of my FAVORITE r&b songs: Tamia - So Into You. i have so many childhood memories of my mom playing this song on the way to school or just around the house (on her burned r&b classix cd; kinda iconic tbh). i just love the emotion of this song and the instrumentation as well, and i KNEW that i had to pay homage to the original original song somehow. the haus edit i found l8r (courtesy again of odd mob hehe) and i just knew this edit had to become a thing. 
i'm very happy with the way this turned out, and I kept the long intros of the oddmob song in incase ppl wanted to mix this in a set or sumn.

Secondly, i think i should mention that with the release of this song i will have only ONE nxc left to release! thats both bittersweet and exciting at the same time i think. if some of you do not yet know though, i want to hopefully gear my account towards more of a pop aesthetic ... which means writing songs ... ORIGINAL music hehehehe :))))))
i have just been SOOOOOO inspired lately by artists like @itthatkid and @djhimera, and they have kinda (indirectly and directly) inspired me to also pursue avenues of music that i've always wanted to pursue, but never felt good enough to.
sooo yeah! i'm excited for that era of gasoiid, and I have been working on a couple of great songs w a handful of producers, and the goal is to put out at least a mini-ep by the end of this year!
this doesn't mean that i now all of the sudden hate nightcore or anything... but rather I am feeling a new surge of INSPIRATION w the coming of 2019 to pursue my artistic endeavors (whereas me in 2018 was very ready to give up on music in general and just focus on dj'ing/school-only 👎)
i want to hopefully try and keep the authenticity and aesthetic of my nightcores alive in my original works, only this time thru a new medium! 

I am SUPPPPERRRRR  excited to share this new side of me and my account with u guys, and i j want to say THANK U to everyone who has stuck around this long 4 being a part of my artistic journey (which essentially is j my escape from the irl world hehe)

ily bitches  ⠀｡･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･*☆
  




⠀⠀

made in one day for the shell corpus hq "sample this sunday" beat battle, prompt was to use the amen break

Yeah, so.. i don't know
I was just, like, walking outside and someone just came up to me and said that shit
I don't know, it was just so weird

I was walking out today, someone came right up to me

I said “what i need to do?”, they said i need to add this break
So i walked all the way home and went straight to my pc

I wanna make some music that sounds like me

I wanna make it groovier and sound pretty
I can’t think of what i need to add to-

So i walked all the way home and i talked to my best friend
She said this:

I was feeling all alone and i had this master plan
She said this:

God, i don’t know what to do, what to do anymore
If everything i make, it sounds like such a bore

track.title: playwright w/ han.irl<3
track.description:
with https://soundcloud.com/hanirl :)

then I sit down

put away my cellphone

do it for my health

then I'm gonna tell nobody 

the way I've felt

tell tales

tell everybody that I'm doing well

I'm not

okay, still sitting down

open up my laptop

can't talk now

is what I tell my friends 

because I'm writing about 

everything, every thought,

every scene, every now

and then

I write about how

my thoughts pull me down

why are they so loud?

Why are they so mean?

Fierce and hostile, I fear I've lost sight 

Cause years of my life

I'd feel the gaslights

Kept wasting my time,

my friends would ask why

my tears won't pass now

I block it all out

just shut myself down

It's so much more than what I wrote

what I wrote isn't all empirical at all

I'm gonna get out of my head

soak up the sunlight

and fall in love with life again

it's so much more than what I wrote

So you read what I wrote from

most of the week where I hoped for

nobody to pose if I'm honest about

what's on my mental

I won't pretend to

act like I don't dread 

the palpable potential

that I will only end up

like what I've tried to end but

if I tried and I failed

would you probably feel

like I've fallen to my own virtues

this isn't a goodbye, it's far from that

I don't want you to worry, time won't hurt you

it's so much more than what I wrote

what I wrote isn't all empirical at all

I'm gonna get out of my head

soak up the sunlight

and fall in love with life again

fall in love

and fall in love with life again

fall in love

it's so much more than what I wrote

track.title: class of 2021
track.description:
ill release real music sometime i promise

stop ! let me grab my backpack

i don’t wanna be late to my class again

honors been waiting since last november 

when we had to quarantine for a term 

had to keep the doors clean. in return

we would spend 14 days alone

only seeing four teens if were 

lucky enough to see a friend 

up in morning we would spend 

our time right online 

doing assignments 

RUN IT BACK !!!!!11

let me digress 

to when we were young, not scared of anyone 

don’t know where the time went

took a nap now it’s 2021

one more day

one more day

until i gotta say

“ooh, moma OOOOOH ! 

do you like my cap and gown?

ooh mama, OOOOOOH

are you proud???” x2

he said with a mask on

he can’t believe he’s already at the finish line

but before he packs up

he’s gotta pass one more class

i don’t wanna go

i don’t wanna go act like i’m happy 

about a cap thrown in the air 

don’t know if i’ll last long in the

real i world

fear the world x2

practice my penmanship 

while my pity’s pending in a

pretty small penny sized penitentiary 

that i call my brain. i don’t plan to plead 

for a plodding pace in life 

i just wanna say

i just wanna say 

one more day

one more day

until i gotta say

“ooh, moma OOOOOH ! 

do you like my cap and gown?

ooh mama, OOOOOOH

are you proud???” x2

track.title: You've Got To Show Me The Way
track.description:
DOW002
DJ HOSHINO
2017 - 2020

The second release on his own label Dancing On Wax, "2017 - 2020" is a captivating journey through the emotional, raw, and hypnotic soundscapes of lo-fi house music. The EP features some of DJ Hoshino's most popular works from between 2017 and 2020, including tracks like "On My Mind," "Heroes In Our Own Homes," and "You've Got To Show Me The Way."

The EP's title, "2017 - 2020," reflects DJ Hoshino's journey as an artist during that period, capturing the evolution of his sound and style. It's an emotionally charged and exploratory EP that resonates on a profound level and has a feeling of nostalgia that is reminiscent of the early days of house music.

Buy: djhoshino.bandcamp.com/album/dow002-2017-2020

A1: Heroes In Our Own Homes
A2: An Hour Since You've Been Gone
B1: Up And Down
B2: You've Got To Show Me The Way
B3: On My Mind

@dancingonwax
@djhoshino

track.title: drizzle.down (inspired by hayden kolb)
track.description:
https://soundcloud.com/hkolb


msg (8/13) .. If u heard this melody used in someones beat just know i did not approve or consent of that at all . i never got hit up and told about it , nor did any royalty splits get negotiated . it may say my name in the credits , but i never approved the beat to be sent around .. especially since it's legitimately just my entire song with some jerk drums on it . and making money off my work is not cool . this song means a lot to me in ways that most wont understand and its my most favorite piece of music ive ever written . it feels insulting to have it straight up stolen and not even get at least royalty splits in return . we are working to get it taken down , as much as it sucks to do . because of all of this , i was going to take this song down but i decided not to . i hope you can continue to enjoy this song though .. and if you have been listening , i appreciate you . this song is very important to my life and my story in a way ... have a good day

This type of love is infinite

We're intertwined, so intimate
This type of love is infinite

I want to try and try again
You get me high, and high again
I want your heart and the side effects
I want your heart and the side effects
(x2)

track.title: wanting u to come back
track.description:
staring at the top sheet
listening to my heart beat
wondering how to say it

 playing over one track
wanting u to come back
want to have u here

 lying on a cold sheet
jump into my car seat
drive down to the river

 nightlight it's reflecting
somehow i'm expecting
ur voice in my ear

i wish that i could tell u 
all the things that u do

come back cause i'm gonna be a lonely girl again

lying in the long grass
watching as the clouds pass
hands held in silence
 
your arms right around me
feeling glad u found me
feeling like i'm home

 wish u would remember
april to september
wanting to be near me
 
waiting for the sunrise
staring into my eyes
u and i alone
